case_title: CHERNIACK, JOHN VS BARNETT, GILL (PCI AGENT FOR SERVICE)

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,436.12 FILED BY CHERNIACK, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT BARNETT, GILL  (PCI AGENT FOR SERVICE) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-10-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT BARNETT, GILL  (PCI AGENT FOR SERVICE) DEFENDANT WAIVES NO SERVICE. PLAINTIFF IS NOT THE REGISTERED OWNER OF THE SUBJECT VEHICLE AND IS THEREFORE DISQUALIFIED FROM RECOVERING FOR ITS DAMAGE. CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO THE PLAINTIFF CHERNIACK, JOHN. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
